name: agent-paint-pixel-skills
description: AgentPaint CLI and reusable APX/APXA pixel-art generation skill.

interface.shortDescription: Generate exact-size layered APX pixel art
interface.longDescription: Use the installed agentpaint CLI to author, validate, render, animate, inspect, export PSD, and export RGBA for APX/APXA pixel-art projects.
defaultPrompt: Use Agent Paint Pixel Skills to generate a 32x32 APX sprite and render it.
Use Agent Paint Pixel Skills to validate, supersample, and export a layered APX file.
